# Security Policy

VibeBar is a security-focused tool, so we take vulnerabilities in the tool
itself seriously.

## Reporting a vulnerability

**Please do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, report privately using GitHub's
[private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Bridgeware-Dynamics-Business/Vibebar/security/advisories/new)
under the repository's **Security** tab. If that isn't available to you,
contact the maintainer directly.

When reporting, please include:

- A description of the issue and its potential impact
- Steps to reproduce, or a proof of concept
- The version of VibeBar affected
- Any suggested mitigation, if you have one

We'll acknowledge your report as quickly as we can, keep you updated on
progress, and credit you in the release notes if you'd like.

## Supported versions

This project is in active early development. Security fixes are applied to the
latest release on `main`.
